title: Emit one idempotent receipt event on paid transition
prompt: Complete the paid-invoice receipt behavior. The first successful `markPaid(id)` transition must append one paid audit entry and send exactly one receipt event through the notifications owner. Repeating `markPaid(id)` must be idempotent and send no second receipt. Update code, tests, README, and the owning durable Context because this establishes a cross-module contract.
